commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a Control UI chat-run watchdog that probes `agent.wait` after inactivity, clears stale local run state, reloads chat history, and flushes queued follow-up messages, with focused UI regression tests and mock updates.

PR surface: Source +199, Tests +338. Total +537 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main keeps chat busy while `chatRunId` is set and `flushChatQueue` returns while busy; I did not run a live browser/gateway reproduction in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] No automated code repair is recommended; the remaining blocker is a maintainer proof decision or redacted real behavior proof plus ordinary exact-head gates.

target.title: fix: recover stuck Control UI chat runs
target.body:
## Summary
- Repairs #42258 as the canonical fix path for #42213.
- Keeps the stuck-run recovery scoped to the Control UI chat lifecycle and queued-message flush behavior.
- Addresses hydrated Greptile findings: do not surface transient background probe failures as user-visible errors, avoid double watchdog scheduling, and remove redundant run-activity writes.

## Credit
This continues the contributor work from @siewcapital in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42258. ClawSweeper should preserve that source attribution when updating the branch.

## Verification
- pnpm test ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Real behavior proof should cover a Control UI chat run that misses its terminal event, recovers idle state via the watchdog/session proof path, reloads history, and flushes a queued follow-up without showing a transient probe error banner.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: gitcrawl-1599-fix-register-abortcontroller-for-agent-rpc-runs-so-chat-abort-wo
- Source PRs: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42258
- Credit: Repair contributor branch for source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/42258 by @siewcapital; preserve source PR attribution in the repaired PR history/body.; Do not edit CHANGELOG.md for normal OpenClaw repair work; keep release-note context in the PR body and eventual squash message.; Agent RPC abort support is already credited/landed via https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/71214 and should not be reopened in this repair.
- Validation: pnpm test ui/src/ui/controllers/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-gateway.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-lifecycle.node.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
- Repair fallback: GitHub rejected the repair branch push because it updates workflow files and the ClawSweeper app token does not have workflows permission

Inherited issue-closing references from the source PR:
Closes #42213

Co-author credit kept:
- @siewcapital: Co-authored-by: Siew's Capital Jarvis <264786654+siewcapital@users.noreply.github.com>

fish notes: model gpt-5.5, reasoning high; reviewed against ae868b7b18df.
